# BEDragInteraction

**Class**

A `UIDragInteraction` subclass with features specific to browsers to enable asynchronous preparations and behaviours.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor class BEDragInteraction
```

## Overview

An interaction that enables your app to asynchronously provide drag items.

## Overview

`BEDragInteraction` is a subclass of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIDragInteraction] that additionally supports asynchronous interaction.

When a person drags a UI element in your browser app, create a `BEDragInteraction` and attach it to the source view. When you create the object, set its [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEDragInteraction/delegate] to an object that conforms to [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEDragInteractionDelegate]. Use the delegate to prepare the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIDragSession] before the system requests drag items, which it does by calling the delegate’s [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIDragInteractionDelegate/dragInteraction(_:itemsForBeginning:)] method.

## Creating a drag interaction

- **init(delegate:)**: Creates an drag interaction with the specified delegate.

## Handling drag gestures

- **delegate**: The object that manages the drag interaction lifecycle.
- **BEDragInteractionDelegate**: A protocol to which the drag interaction delegates conform.

## Drag interaction

- **BEDragInteractionDelegate**: A protocol to which the drag interaction delegates conform.

## Inherits From

- UIDragInteraction

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- UIInteraction
